instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT implement the UI yet. Present the contents of /app/OPTIONS.md to the user. The user has explicitly requested a menu of clear, distinct CHOICES for the UI redesign. Await their selections for Tile System, Motion System, and Aesthetic Mood.

testing.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

component_guidelines.loan_tile: Must retain Rate p.a., EMI est, Total cost, Approval odds, Apply CTA, Processing fee without clutter.
component_guidelines.data_testid_rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
